hero.subtitle: ResQAI transforms unstructured distress signals into prioritized, map-based rescue actions in real time — connecting citizens and emergency teams through AI-driven coordination.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: From signal to rescue in under 5 minutes
howItWorks.s1Desc: Distress reports from citizens, social media, and IoT sensors are captured in real time.
howItWorks.s2Desc: Our AI engine scores severity, identifies disaster type, and prioritizes each signal instantly.
howItWorks.s3Desc: Incidents are plotted on a live map with hotspot clustering and route optimization.
howItWorks.s4Desc: Nearest available rescue teams are alerted and dispatched with full situational context.

safety.title: Safety & Survival Guide
safety.subtitle: Essential life-saving protocols for before, during, and after disasters

earthquake.title: Earthquake
before: Prepare an emergency kit with 3-day supplies
Identify safe spots under sturdy desks
during: Stay away from glass windows and exterior walls
If outdoors, move to an open area away from buildings
after: Check for injuries and apply first aid
Listen to radio for emergency updates
earthquake.tip: Do not use elevators during or immediately after the quake.

flood.title: Flood
before: Store valuables and documents in waterproof containers
Move essential items to upper floors
during: Do not walk or drive through flowing water
after: Avoid floodwaters as they may be contaminated
Do not use wet electrical equipment
Clean and disinfect everything that got wet
flood.tip: Just 6 inches of moving water can knock you down.

fire.title: Fire
before: Install smoke alarms on every level
Plan and practice an escape route
during: Get out quickly and stay close to the floor
Check doors for heat before opening
If clothes catch fire: Stop, Drop, and Roll
after: Do not re-enter the building until cleared
Check with officials before using utilities
fire.tip: Never use an elevator during a fire evacuation.

cyclone.title: Cyclone
before: Stock up on batteries and non-perishable food
during: Turn off main power if instructed
after: Watch out for fallen power lines
Do not enter heavily damaged buildings
cyclone.tip: The calm 'eye' of the storm is deceptive. Stay inside.

chatbot.title: Disaster AI Assistant
chatbot.subtitle: Ask me about disaster safety
chatbot.welcome: Hello! 👋 I'm your Disaster Safety Assistant. Ask me about earthquake, flood, fire, or cyclone safety — or tap a quick topic below.
chatbot.error: Sorry, I couldn't process that. Please try again.
